American actor (born 1965)

| Born | (1965-08-05) August 5, 1965 (age 60)  [New York](/wiki/New_York_City "New York City"), [New York](/wiki/New_York_(state) "New York (state)"), U.S. |
| Occupation | Actor |

| Relatives | [Dean Winters](/wiki/Dean_Winters "Dean Winters") (brother) |

**Scott William Winters** (born August 5, 1965) is an American actor.

Winters is of Irish and Italian descent,[[1]](#cite_note-meet-1) and grew up on [Long Island](/wiki/Long_Island "Long Island") and in [Scottsdale, Arizona](/wiki/Scottsdale,_Arizona "Scottsdale, Arizona"). He attended [Brophy College Preparatory](/wiki/Brophy_College_Preparatory "Brophy College Preparatory"), a Jesuit school in [Phoenix](/wiki/Phoenix,_Arizona "Phoenix, Arizona"). Winters has three siblings: brothers [Dean](/wiki/Dean_Winters "Dean Winters") (an actor) and Bradford (a poet/writer), and a sister, Blair Winters. Scott is best known for playing [Cyril O'Reily](/wiki/Cyril_O%27Reily "Cyril O'Reily") in the [HBO](/wiki/HBO "HBO") drama *[Oz](/wiki/Oz_(TV_series) "Oz (TV series)")* opposite his brother, Dean, who appeared as Cyril's brother, [Ryan](/wiki/Ryan_O%27Reily "Ryan O'Reily").

Winters had a notable role in the 1997 film *[Good Will Hunting](/wiki/Good_Will_Hunting "Good Will Hunting")* as Clark, a pompous rival for [Minnie Driver](/wiki/Minnie_Driver "Minnie Driver")'s attention who is bested by [Matt Damon](/wiki/Matt_Damon "Matt Damon"). He reprised the role, along with Damon and [Ben Affleck](/wiki/Ben_Affleck "Ben Affleck"), in a parody scene in *[Jay and Silent Bob Strike Back](/wiki/Jay_and_Silent_Bob_Strike_Back "Jay and Silent Bob Strike Back")* (2001). He played [Det. Stan Hatcher](/wiki/Det._Stan_Hatcher "Det. Stan Hatcher"), a recurring character on the TV series *[NYPD Blue](/wiki/NYPD_Blue "NYPD Blue")*. He appeared in a few episodes of Season 6 of *[24](/wiki/24_(TV_series) "24 (TV series)")*, as FBI Agent Samuels, and in Season 3 of *[The Americans](/wiki/The_Americans "The Americans")* as EST seminar leader Lawrence. He made an appearance in the show *[The Book of Daniel](/wiki/The_Book_of_Daniel_(TV_series) "The Book of Daniel (TV series)")*, in an episode that was only aired [online](/wiki/Internet "Internet").[[2]](#cite_note-2)
